backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the DroneWash Dashboard defining all core data types (Job, Expense, Quote, Invoice, Fund, Contract, etc.) and persistent state with full CRUD operations, financial metrics, access control, and blob storage integration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two features—adding an optional 'Initial Balance' field to CreateFundDialog and updating the useCreateFund hook to pass that value—to their respective source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, describing each component's purpose and notable implementation details.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the DroneWash QuotePro Admin Dashboard that mounts the React app into a `#root` div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wires together authentication (Internet Identity), profile setup, data migration, theme, and React Query, rendering a lazy-loaded Dashboard after login or appropriate loading/error screens.
frontend/src/components/AddFundTransacti: Modal dialog component for adding an inflow or outflow transaction to a specific fund, with fields for amount, type, category, and description, using the useAddFundTransaction mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/AddGoalDialog.ts: Modal dialog for creating a monthly goal with description, target value, metrics, target date, and milestone tracking fields, encoding extra metadata into the description string before submitting via the useAddGoal hook.
frontend/src/components/AddInvestmentTra: A dialog component for adding investment transactions (inflow/outflow) with fields for amount, transaction type, allocation type, and description, using the useAddInvestmentTransaction hook.
frontend/src/components/AddMaintenanceEx: A dialog component for logging maintenance expenses with fields for amount, equipment type, part category, purpose, and receipt URL, submitting via the useAddMaintenanceExpense hook.
frontend/src/components/AddMaintenanceIn: A dialog component for manually adding funds to the maintenance fund balance, accepting an amount and description and submitting via the useAddMaintenanceFundInflow hook.
Renders two memoized charts—a bar chart for monthly revenue vs. expenses and a line chart for profit projections—fetching data via React Query hooks and supporting error-state refresh.
frontend/src/components/ArchivedInvestme: An informational component that notifies users the old archived investments feature has been replaced by the Investment Fund system, with a navigation button to the new fund tab.
frontend/src/components/BackupVersionsDi: A dialog that lists locally stored backup versions with their timestamps, sizes, and record counts, allowing users to download or delete individual backups.
frontend/src/components/COGSSettings.tsx: A settings component for configuring Cost of Goods Sold parameters (van fuel rates by city, generator fuel rate, additional pilot fee, chemicals cost) with localStorage persistence and save functionality.
frontend/src/components/ContractsManagem: A full CRUD management component for client contracts, supporting create/edit/delete dialogs, search/filter by status, and integration with React Query hooks for backend operations.
frontend/src/components/CreateFundDialog: A dialog form for creating a new financial fund with fields for name, type, spending limit, approval threshold, and optional initial balance, using the useCreateFund mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/DataEntryForms.t: A data entry component providing forms to add jobs and expenses, and tables to list, edit, and delete existing jobs and expenses via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/components/DataMigrationHan: A migration utility component that detects legacy data in localStorage and migrates jobs, expenses, quotes, invoices, and goals to the backend via mutation hooks, showing progress and status.
frontend/src/components/DeleteConfirmDia: A reusable alert dialog component that prompts the user to confirm a delete action, with configurable title, description, and a loading state during deletion.
frontend/src/components/EditExpenseDialo: A dialog component for editing an existing expense, allowing users to update amount, date, category, and additional info, then submitting via the useUpdateExpense mutation.
frontend/src/components/EditFundDialog.t: A dialog component for editing a fund's name, spending limit, and approval threshold, using the useUpdateFund mutation to persist changes.
frontend/src/components/EditJobDialog.ts: A dialog component for editing an existing job's client name, revenue, date, and sector, submitting updates via the useUpdateJob mutation.
frontend/src/components/ErrorPanel.tsx: A reusable card component that displays an error message with an optional retry button when data loading fails.
frontend/src/components/ExpensesManageme: A full expense management UI with filtering by search and category, bulk/single delete support, and a summary of total expenses using the useGetAllExpenses and useDeleteExpense hooks.
frontend/src/components/FinancialMetrics: A dashboard component displaying key financial metrics and fund balances (main, maintenance, salaries, investment) with expandable detail cards, fund editing, and transaction dialogs.
React component for managing financial funds, displaying overview cards, transactions, transfers, and active alerts across tabbed views. Supports admin actions like creating, editing, deleting funds, and adding transactions.
frontend/src/components/InvestmentFundMa: React component that displays investment fund balance, total inflows/outflows, and transaction history. Allows admins to add new investment transactions via a dialog.
Form component for creating invoices by selecting a quote and entering customer details, then generating and downloading a PDF upon submission.
frontend/src/components/InvoicesList.tsx: Displays a filterable, searchable table of invoices with options to download PDFs, toggle paid/pending status, and delete invoices with admin controls.
frontend/src/components/JobCalendar.tsx: Monthly calendar component that renders jobs on their scheduled dates, supports month navigation, and opens a job details dialog on selection.
frontend/src/components/JobDetailsDialog: A dialog component for viewing and editing job details (customer info, financial data) with admin-only write access, using form state and the updateJob mutation.
frontend/src/components/KPIWidgets.tsx: Displays four KPI cards (net profit trend, job completion rate, VAT due, fund delta) computed from financial metrics, jobs, and invoices data.
frontend/src/components/LoadingPanel.tsx: A simple card component that shows a spinning loader and an optional message while data is being fetched.
frontend/src/components/MaintenanceManag: Manages the maintenance fund by displaying balance/collected/spent summary cards and a transaction history table, with admin controls to add expenses, add inflows, and reset the fund.
frontend/src/components/MobileNav.tsx: A slide-out sheet navigation component for mobile screens that renders all app tabs as buttons, conditionally including a Settings tab for admins.
frontend/src/components/MonthlyReports.t: Renders a monthly report view with month/year selectors, summary metrics, goals tracking, and CSV export functionality, pulling data from useMonthlyReport and useMonthlyGoalsByMonthYear hooks.
frontend/src/components/PricingManagemen: Provides an admin UI for viewing and updating tiered service rates (per service type and area tier), loading existing rates and saving changes via the setServiceRate mutation.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupDial: A modal dialog component that collects a user's name, email, and role (Admin or Viewer) on first launch and calls an onSave callback with the entered values.
A multi-service quote calculator form that computes pricing with area-based tiers, COGS breakdown (fuel, chemicals, pilot), volume discounts, VAT, and saves quotes via a backend mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/QuotesList.tsx: Displays a searchable, filterable table of all saved quotes with options to expand details, delete, and export customer-facing or internal PDF reports.
frontend/src/components/ReportingSection: Renders a reporting dashboard that calculates unit economics from jobs and expenses data and provides export buttons for cash flow CSV/PDF and unit economics CSV.
frontend/src/components/UserPreferencesD: A dialog for saving user preferences (dark mode, dashboard layout, metric filters) to the backend and applying the selected theme via next-themes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks and local TypeScript interfaces for all backend data operations including jobs, expenses, quotes, invoices, funds, and backup management.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including sidebar and chart colors.
frontend/src/lib/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates customer-facing quote PDFs by opening a new browser window with styled HTML and triggering the print dialog.
frontend/src/lib/reportGenerator.ts: Generates cash flow reports as either a downloadable CSV file or a printable HTML/PDF document from job and expense data.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page with tab-based navigation that lazily loads all major feature components and handles backup creation, user preferences, and role-based access.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Renders a centered login card for the DroneWash QuotePro admin dashboard that authenticates users via Internet Identity, showing a loading state during login and displaying errors via toast notifications.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters (from both regular and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that sets up dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, accordion keyframe animations, and registers the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
frontend/vite.config.ts: Vite build configuration that loads canister IDs from both production and local DFX JSON files, injects them as environment variables, sets up a React plugin, path aliases, and a proxy for the local ICP replica API.
project_state.json: Tracks the DroneWash Dashboard project state including schema version, existing implemented features (optional initial balance in CreateFundDialog and useCreateFund hook), and pending feature requests for backend fund creation with an initial balance parameter.
